format_full_name: Portable Executable — Dynamic Link Library (PE DLL)
description: The Windows PE DLL format. A DLL uses the same Portable Executable format as an .exe; the differences lie in the IMAGE_FILE_DLL flag, the export table, an optional DllMain entry point, and base-relocation requirements.

variants.name: PE32 32-bit DLL (dynamic, exports by name, may import from other DLLs)
variants.description: 32-bit Windows DLL with named exports and optional imports from other DLLs. Uses stdcall calling convention for DllMain. The IMAGE_FILE_DLL flag (0x2000) must be set in the COFF Characteristics. Typical Characteristics value: 0x2102.

required_components.name: MZ Header
required_components.description: MS-DOS 2.0 compatible header. Windows requires the MZ magic at file offset 0 and a valid e_lfanew pointing to the PE signature. Identical layout for DLLs and EXEs.

fields.name: (padding)
fields.note: Unused; set to zero for a minimal stub

fields.name: e_lfanew
fields.note: File offset of the PE signature; must be >= 0x40

code_example.source:
; === MZ Header (64 bytes at file offset 0x0000) ===
mz_header:
    dw 0x5A4D           ; e_magic = 'MZ'
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cblp  (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cp    (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_crlc  (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cparhdr (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_minalloc
    dw 0xFFFF           ; e_maxalloc
    dw 0x0000           ; e_ss
    dw 0x00B8           ; e_sp
    dw 0x0000           ; e_csum
    dw 0x0000           ; e_ip
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cs
    dw 0x0040           ; e_lfarlc
    dw 0x0000           ; e_ovno
    times 4 dw 0x0000   ; e_res[4]
    dw 0x0000           ; e_oemid
    dw 0x0000           ; e_oeminfo
    times 10 dw 0x0000  ; e_res2[10]
    dd 0x00000080       ; e_lfanew -> PE signature at 0x80

required_components.name: PE Signature
required_components.description: Four-byte magic at the file offset stored in e_lfanew. Must be exactly 'PE\0\0'.

fields.name: Signature
fields.note: ASCII 'PE' followed by two zero bytes

code_example.source:
; === PE Signature (4 bytes at e_lfanew = 0x0080) ===
pe_signature:
    db 'P', 'E', 0, 0     ; 'PE\0\0'

required_components.name: COFF File Header (IMAGE_FILE_DLL)
required_components.description: 20-byte COFF header. Machine = 0x014C (i386). Characteristics must include IMAGE_FILE_DLL (0x2000) in addition to IMAGE_FILE_EXECUTABLE_IMAGE (0x0002) and IMAGE_FILE_32BIT_MACHINE (0x0100). Typical value: 0x2102.

fields.name: TimeDateStamp
fields.note: Unix timestamp of link time; 0 is valid

code_example.source:
; === COFF File Header (20 bytes at 0x0084) ===
coff_header:
    dw 0x014C           ; Machine = IMAGE_FILE_MACHINE_I386
    dw NUM_SECTIONS     ; NumberOfSections
    dd 0                ; TimeDateStamp
    dd 0                ; PointerToSymbolTable
    dd 0                ; NumberOfSymbols
    dw 0x00E0           ; SizeOfOptionalHeader = 224 (PE32)
    dw 0x2102           ; Characteristics: EXECUTABLE | 32BIT | DLL

required_components.name: Optional Header (PE32, DLL)
required_components.description: 224-byte PE32 Optional Header for a DLL. ImageBase defaults to 0x10000000 (DLL convention). AddressOfEntryPoint points to DllMain or is 0. DataDirectory[0] (Export Table) and DataDirectory[5] (Base Relocation Table) must be populated. DllCharacteristics typically 0x0140 (DYNAMIC_BASE | NX_COMPAT).

fields.name: SizeOfCode
fields.note: Total size of all code sections

fields.name: AddressOfEntryPoint
fields.note: RVA of DllMain; 0 if no entry point

fields.name: BaseOfData
fields.note: RVA of .data (PE32 only; absent in PE32+)

fields.name: DataDirectory[0] (Export)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Export Directory Table

fields.name: DataDirectory[1] (Import)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Import Directory Table (if importing)

fields.name: DataDirectory[5] (BaseReloc)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Base Relocation Table (.reloc)

fields.name: DataDirectory[12] (IAT)
fields.note: RVA and size of the IAT (if importing)

code_example.source:
; === Optional Header PE32 — DLL (224 bytes at 0x0098) ===
opt_header:
    dw 0x010B       ; Magic = PE32
    db 0, 0         ; LinkerVersion (major, minor)
    dd CODE_SIZE    ; SizeOfCode
    dd DATA_SIZE    ; SizeOfInitializedData
    dd 0            ; SizeOfUninitializedData
    dd DLLMAIN_RVA  ; AddressOfEntryPoint (RVA of DllMain, or 0)
    dd 0x1000       ; BaseOfCode (RVA)
    dd 0x2000       ; BaseOfData (RVA) — PE32 only
    dd 0x10000000   ; ImageBase (DLL default)
    dd 0x1000       ; SectionAlignment (4 KB)
    dd 0x0200       ; FileAlignment    (512 B)
    dw 6, 0         ; OS version 6.0
    dw 0, 0         ; Image version
    dw 6, 0         ; Subsystem version 6.0
    dd 0            ; Win32VersionValue (must be 0)
    dd IMAGE_SIZE   ; SizeOfImage
    dd HDR_SIZE     ; SizeOfHeaders
    dd 0            ; CheckSum
    dw 3            ; Subsystem = WINDOWS_CUI
    dw 0x0140       ; DllCharacteristics: DYNAMIC_BASE | NX_COMPAT
    dd 0x100000     ; SizeOfStackReserve
    dd 0x1000       ; SizeOfStackCommit
    dd 0x100000     ; SizeOfHeapReserve
    dd 0x1000       ; SizeOfHeapCommit
    dd 0            ; LoaderFlags
    dd 16           ; NumberOfRvaAndSizes
    ; DataDirectory[0] — Export Table
    dd EXPORT_DIR_RVA, EXPORT_DIR_SIZE
    ; DataDirectory[1] — Import Table
    dd IMPORT_DIR_RVA, IMPORT_DIR_SIZE
    dq 0            ; [2] Resource
    dq 0            ; [3] Exception
    dq 0            ; [4] Certificate
    ; DataDirectory[5] — Base Relocation Table
    dd RELOC_RVA, RELOC_SIZE
    times 6 dq 0    ; [6..11]
    ; DataDirectory[12] — IAT
    dd IAT_RVA, IAT_SIZE
    times 3 dq 0    ; [13..15]

required_components.name: Export Directory Table
required_components.description: Single 40-byte structure pointed to by DataDirectory[0]. Contains pointers to the Export Address Table (EAT), Export Name Pointer Table, and Export Ordinal Table. The DLL name RVA and function counts are stored here.

fields.name: TimeDateStamp
fields.note: Export table creation timestamp; 0 is valid

fields.name: Name
fields.note: RVA to null-terminated ASCII DLL name (e.g. 'mylib.dll')

fields.name: NumberOfFunctions
fields.note: Total entries in the Export Address Table

fields.name: NumberOfNames
fields.note: Number of named exports (may be less than NumberOfFunctions)

fields.name: AddressOfFunctions
fields.note: RVA to the Export Address Table (array of function RVAs)

fields.name: AddressOfNames
fields.note: RVA to the Export Name Pointer Table (sorted array of name RVAs)

fields.name: AddressOfNameOrdinals
fields.note: RVA to the Export Ordinal Table (array of 2-byte ordinals)

code_example.source:
; === Export Directory Table (40 bytes, inside .edata section) ===
export_dir:
    dd 0                    ; Characteristics (reserved)
    dd 0                    ; TimeDateStamp
    dw 0                    ; MajorVersion
    dw 0                    ; MinorVersion
    dd DLL_NAME_RVA         ; Name -> 'mylib.dll\0'
    dd 1                    ; Base (starting ordinal)
    dd NUM_FUNCTIONS        ; NumberOfFunctions
    dd NUM_NAMES            ; NumberOfNames
    dd EAT_RVA              ; AddressOfFunctions -> EAT
    dd NAME_PTR_RVA         ; AddressOfNames -> Name Pointer Table
    dd ORDINAL_TBL_RVA      ; AddressOfNameOrdinals -> Ordinal Table

; Export Address Table (EAT)
eat:
    dd _Add_RVA             ; ordinal 1 -> Add
    dd _Sub_RVA             ; ordinal 2 -> Subtract

; Export Name Pointer Table (sorted lexically)
name_ptrs:
    dd NAME_ADD_RVA         ; -> 'Add\0'
    dd NAME_SUB_RVA         ; -> 'Subtract\0'

; Export Ordinal Table (parallel to Name Pointer Table)
ordinals:
    dw 0                    ; 'Add' -> EAT[0]
    dw 1                    ; 'Subtract' -> EAT[1]

; ASCII name strings
dll_name:   db 'mylib.dll', 0
name_add:   db 'Add', 0
name_sub:   db 'Subtract', 0

required_components.name: Base Relocation Table (.reloc)
required_components.description: Pointed to by DataDirectory[5]. Array of variable-length relocation blocks, each covering one 4 KB page. Essential for DLLs since they are frequently loaded at addresses other than their preferred ImageBase (ASLR, address collisions). PE32 uses IMAGE_REL_BASED_HIGHLOW (type 3) for 32-bit fixups.

fields.name: VirtualAddress
fields.note: Base RVA of the 4 KB page this block covers

fields.name: SizeOfBlock
fields.note: Total size of this block in bytes (header + entries)

fields.name: TypeOffset[]
fields.note: High 4 bits = relocation type (3 = HIGHLOW for PE32), low 12 bits = page offset; type 0 = padding

code_example.source:
; === Base Relocation Table (.reloc section) ===
; Each block covers one 4 KB page of the image.
reloc_block_0:
    dd 0x1000               ; VirtualAddress: RVA of the page
    dd 12                   ; SizeOfBlock: 8 (header) + 2*2 (entries) = 12
    dw (3 << 12) | 0x005    ; Type=HIGHLOW, Offset=0x005 in page
    dw (0 << 12) | 0x000    ; Type=ABSOLUTE (padding to align block)
reloc_end:

variants.name: PE32 32-bit DLL (static, no imports)
variants.description: Self-contained 32-bit DLL that does not import from any other DLL. Exports functions by name only. The IMAGE_FILE_DLL flag is set. AddressOfEntryPoint can be 0 (no DllMain) or point to a minimal DllMain.

required_components.name: MZ Header
required_components.description: MS-DOS 2.0 compatible header. Identical to the dynamic DLL variant. e_lfanew at offset 0x3C points to the PE signature.

fields.name: (padding)
fields.note: Unused; set to zero for a minimal stub

fields.name: e_lfanew
fields.note: File offset of the PE signature

code_example.source:
; === MZ Header (64 bytes at file offset 0x0000) ===
mz_header:
    dw 0x5A4D           ; e_magic = 'MZ'
    times 29 dw 0x0000  ; unused fields (58 bytes)
    dd 0x00000080       ; e_lfanew -> PE signature at 0x80

required_components.name: PE Signature
required_components.description: Four-byte magic at e_lfanew. Must be 'PE\0\0'.

fields.name: Signature
fields.note: ASCII 'PE' followed by two zero bytes

code_example.source:
; === PE Signature (4 bytes at 0x0080) ===
pe_signature:
    db 'P', 'E', 0, 0

required_components.name: COFF File Header (IMAGE_FILE_DLL)
required_components.description: 20-byte COFF header with IMAGE_FILE_DLL flag set. Characteristics = 0x2102 (EXECUTABLE_IMAGE | 32BIT_MACHINE | DLL). Same as dynamic variant.

fields.name: NumberOfSections
fields.note: Typically fewer sections than dynamic variant (no .idata)

code_example.source:
; === COFF File Header (20 bytes at 0x0084) ===
coff_header:
    dw 0x014C           ; Machine = I386
    dw NUM_SECTIONS     ; NumberOfSections
    dd 0                ; TimeDateStamp
    dd 0                ; PointerToSymbolTable
    dd 0                ; NumberOfSymbols
    dw 0x00E0           ; SizeOfOptionalHeader = 224 (PE32)
    dw 0x2102           ; Characteristics: EXECUTABLE | 32BIT | DLL

required_components.name: Optional Header (PE32, static DLL)
required_components.description: 224-byte PE32 Optional Header. AddressOfEntryPoint is 0 (no DllMain) or points to a minimal DllMain that returns TRUE. DataDirectory[0] (Export Table) must be populated. DataDirectory[1] (Import) and DataDirectory[12] (IAT) are zeroed because this DLL has no imports.

fields.name: AddressOfEntryPoint
fields.note: 0 = no DllMain; or RVA of minimal DllMain

fields.name: DataDirectory[0] (Export)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Export Directory Table

code_example.source:
; === Optional Header PE32 — Static DLL (224 bytes at 0x0098) ===
opt_header:
    dw 0x010B       ; Magic = PE32
    db 0, 0         ; LinkerVersion
    dd CODE_SIZE    ; SizeOfCode
    dd DATA_SIZE    ; SizeOfInitializedData
    dd 0            ; SizeOfUninitializedData
    dd 0            ; AddressOfEntryPoint = 0 (no DllMain)
    dd 0x1000       ; BaseOfCode
    dd 0x2000       ; BaseOfData — PE32 only
    dd 0x10000000   ; ImageBase (DLL default)
    dd 0x1000       ; SectionAlignment
    dd 0x0200       ; FileAlignment
    dw 6, 0         ; OS version 6.0
    dw 0, 0         ; Image version
    dw 6, 0         ; Subsystem version
    dd 0            ; Win32VersionValue
    dd IMAGE_SIZE   ; SizeOfImage
    dd HDR_SIZE     ; SizeOfHeaders
    dd 0            ; CheckSum
    dw 3            ; Subsystem = WINDOWS_CUI
    dw 0x0140       ; DllCharacteristics: DYNAMIC_BASE | NX_COMPAT
    dd 0x100000     ; SizeOfStackReserve
    dd 0x1000       ; SizeOfStackCommit
    dd 0x100000     ; SizeOfHeapReserve
    dd 0x1000       ; SizeOfHeapCommit
    dd 0            ; LoaderFlags
    dd 16           ; NumberOfRvaAndSizes
    ; DataDirectory[0] — Export Table
    dd EXPORT_DIR_RVA, EXPORT_DIR_SIZE
    ; DataDirectory[1] — Import Table (none)
    dq 0
    times 3 dq 0    ; [2..4]
    dq 0            ; [5] Base Reloc (optional for static)
    times 6 dq 0    ; [6..11]
    dq 0            ; [12] IAT (none)
    times 3 dq 0    ; [13..15]

required_components.name: Export Directory Table
required_components.description: Single 40-byte structure pointed to by DataDirectory[0]. Identical layout to the dynamic DLL variant. Lists all exported functions by name.

fields.name: Name
fields.note: RVA to null-terminated DLL name string

fields.name: AddressOfNames
fields.note: RVA to Export Name Pointer Table

code_example.source:
; === Export Directory Table (40 bytes) ===
export_dir:
    dd 0                    ; Characteristics
    dd 0                    ; TimeDateStamp
    dw 0, 0                 ; Major/MinorVersion
    dd DLL_NAME_RVA         ; Name -> 'mylib.dll\0'
    dd 1                    ; Base
    dd NUM_FUNCTIONS        ; NumberOfFunctions
    dd NUM_NAMES            ; NumberOfNames
    dd EAT_RVA              ; AddressOfFunctions
    dd NAME_PTR_RVA         ; AddressOfNames
    dd ORDINAL_TBL_RVA      ; AddressOfNameOrdinals

; Example: single exported function 'Multiply'
eat:        dd _Multiply_RVA
name_ptrs:  dd NAME_MULTIPLY_RVA
ordinals:   dw 0
dll_name:   db 'mylib.dll', 0
name_mul:   db 'Multiply', 0

variants.name: PE32+ 64-bit DLL (dynamic, exports by name, may import)
variants.description: 64-bit Windows DLL with named exports. Uses the Microsoft x64 calling convention for DllMain (RCX, RDX, R8). ImageBase defaults to 0x0000000180000000. Typical Characteristics: 0x2022.

required_components.name: MZ Header
required_components.description: MS-DOS 2.0 compatible header. Identical for 32-bit and 64-bit PE images. e_lfanew at offset 0x3C points to the PE signature.

fields.name: (padding)
fields.note: Unused; set to zero for a minimal stub

fields.name: e_lfanew
fields.note: File offset of the PE signature

code_example.source:
; === MZ Header (64 bytes at file offset 0x0000) ===
mz_header:
    dw 0x5A4D           ; e_magic = 'MZ'
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cblp  (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cp    (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_crlc  (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cparhdr (unused)
    dw 0x0000           ; e_minalloc
    dw 0xFFFF           ; e_maxalloc
    dw 0x0000           ; e_ss
    dw 0x00B8           ; e_sp
    dw 0x0000           ; e_csum
    dw 0x0000           ; e_ip
    dw 0x0000           ; e_cs
    dw 0x0040           ; e_lfarlc
    dw 0x0000           ; e_ovno
    times 4 dw 0x0000   ; e_res[4]
    dw 0x0000           ; e_oemid
    dw 0x0000           ; e_oeminfo
    times 10 dw 0x0000  ; e_res2[10]
    dd 0x00000080       ; e_lfanew -> PE signature at 0x80

required_components.name: PE Signature
required_components.description: Four-byte magic at e_lfanew. Must be 'PE\0\0'.

fields.name: Signature
fields.note: ASCII 'PE' followed by two zero bytes

code_example.source:
; === PE Signature (4 bytes at 0x0080) ===
pe_signature:
    db 'P', 'E', 0, 0

required_components.name: COFF File Header (IMAGE_FILE_DLL, 64-bit)
required_components.description: 20-byte COFF header. Machine = 0x8664 (AMD64). SizeOfOptionalHeader = 240 (PE32+). Characteristics = 0x2022 (EXECUTABLE_IMAGE | LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE | DLL).

code_example.source:
; === COFF File Header (20 bytes at 0x0084) ===
coff_header:
    dw 0x8664           ; Machine = IMAGE_FILE_MACHINE_AMD64
    dw NUM_SECTIONS     ; NumberOfSections
    dd 0                ; TimeDateStamp
    dd 0                ; PointerToSymbolTable
    dd 0                ; NumberOfSymbols
    dw 0x00F0           ; SizeOfOptionalHeader = 240 (PE32+)
    dw 0x2022           ; Characteristics: EXECUTABLE | LARGE_ADDR | DLL

required_components.name: Optional Header (PE32+, DLL, ImageBase 0x0000000180000000)
required_components.description: 240-byte PE32+ Optional Header. BaseOfData field is absent. ImageBase and stack/heap sizes are 8 bytes. ImageBase defaults to 0x0000000180000000 (64-bit DLL convention). DataDirectory[0] (Export) and DataDirectory[5] (Base Reloc) must be populated. ILT/IAT entries are 8 bytes in PE32+.

fields.name: AddressOfEntryPoint
fields.note: RVA of DllMain; 0 if no entry point

fields.name: BaseOfData
fields.note: ABSENT — does not exist in PE32+

fields.name: DataDirectory[0] (Export)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Export Directory Table

fields.name: DataDirectory[1] (Import)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Import Directory Table (if importing)

fields.name: DataDirectory[5] (BaseReloc)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Base Relocation Table

fields.name: DataDirectory[12] (IAT)
fields.note: RVA and size of the IAT (if importing)

code_example.source:
; === Optional Header PE32+ — DLL (240 bytes at 0x0098) ===
opt_header:
    dw 0x020B               ; Magic = PE32+
    db 0, 0                 ; LinkerVersion
    dd CODE_SIZE            ; SizeOfCode
    dd DATA_SIZE            ; SizeOfInitializedData
    dd 0                    ; SizeOfUninitializedData
    dd DLLMAIN_RVA          ; AddressOfEntryPoint (DllMain or 0)
    dd 0x1000               ; BaseOfCode
    ; Note: no BaseOfData field in PE32+
    dq 0x0000000180000000   ; ImageBase (64-bit DLL default)
    dd 0x1000               ; SectionAlignment
    dd 0x0200               ; FileAlignment
    dw 6, 0                 ; OS version 6.0
    dw 0, 0                 ; Image version
    dw 6, 0                 ; Subsystem version
    dd 0                    ; Win32VersionValue
    dd IMAGE_SIZE           ; SizeOfImage
    dd HDR_SIZE             ; SizeOfHeaders
    dd 0                    ; CheckSum
    dw 3                    ; Subsystem = WINDOWS_CUI
    dw 0x0160               ; DllCharacteristics: HIGH_ENTROPY_VA | DYNAMIC_BASE | NX_COMPAT
    dq 0x100000             ; SizeOfStackReserve (8 bytes)
    dq 0x1000               ; SizeOfStackCommit
    dq 0x100000             ; SizeOfHeapReserve
    dq 0x1000               ; SizeOfHeapCommit
    dd 0                    ; LoaderFlags
    dd 16                   ; NumberOfRvaAndSizes
    ; DataDirectory[0] — Export Table
    dd EXPORT_DIR_RVA, EXPORT_DIR_SIZE
    ; DataDirectory[1] — Import Table
    dd IMPORT_DIR_RVA, IMPORT_DIR_SIZE
    dq 0            ; [2] Resource
    dq 0            ; [3] Exception
    dq 0            ; [4] Certificate
    ; DataDirectory[5] — Base Relocation Table
    dd RELOC_RVA, RELOC_SIZE
    times 6 dq 0    ; [6..11]
    ; DataDirectory[12] — IAT
    dd IAT_RVA, IAT_SIZE
    times 3 dq 0    ; [13..15]

required_components.name: Export Directory Table
required_components.description: Single 40-byte structure pointed to by DataDirectory[0]. Layout is identical across PE32 and PE32+ — all RVAs are 32-bit even in 64-bit images. Contains pointers to the EAT, Name Pointer Table, and Ordinal Table.

fields.name: AddressOfFunctions
fields.note: RVA to Export Address Table (4-byte RVAs even in PE32+)

fields.name: AddressOfNames
fields.note: RVA to Export Name Pointer Table (sorted)

code_example.source:
; === Export Directory Table (40 bytes, .edata section) ===
export_dir:
    dd 0                    ; Characteristics
    dd 0                    ; TimeDateStamp
    dw 0, 0                 ; Major/MinorVersion
    dd DLL_NAME_RVA         ; Name -> 'mylib.dll\0'
    dd 1                    ; Base
    dd NUM_FUNCTIONS        ; NumberOfFunctions
    dd NUM_NAMES            ; NumberOfNames
    dd EAT_RVA              ; AddressOfFunctions
    dd NAME_PTR_RVA         ; AddressOfNames
    dd ORDINAL_TBL_RVA      ; AddressOfNameOrdinals

; 64-bit DllMain entry point (Microsoft x64 calling convention)
section .text
global DllMain
export DllMain

DllMain:
    ; RCX = hinstDLL, RDX = fdwReason, R8 = lpvReserved
    mov   eax, 1            ; return TRUE
    ret

required_components.name: Base Relocation Table (.reloc)
required_components.description: Pointed to by DataDirectory[5]. Array of relocation blocks covering 4 KB pages. PE32+ uses IMAGE_REL_BASED_DIR64 (type 10) for 64-bit address fixups instead of HIGHLOW (type 3) used by PE32.

fields.name: VirtualAddress
fields.note: Base RVA of the 4 KB page

fields.name: TypeOffset[]
fields.note: High 4 bits = type (10 = DIR64 for PE32+), low 12 bits = page offset; type 0 = padding

code_example.source:
; === Base Relocation Table (.reloc section, PE32+) ===
reloc_block_0:
    dd 0x1000               ; VirtualAddress: RVA of the page
    dd 12                   ; SizeOfBlock: 8 (header) + 2*2 (entries) = 12
    dw (10 << 12) | 0x008   ; Type=DIR64, Offset=0x008 in page
    dw (0  << 12) | 0x000   ; Type=ABSOLUTE (padding)
reloc_end:

variants.name: PE32+ 64-bit DLL (static, no imports)
variants.description: Self-contained 64-bit DLL with no imports. Exports functions by name. AddressOfEntryPoint is 0 or a minimal DllMain.

required_components.name: MZ Header
required_components.description: MS-DOS 2.0 compatible header. Identical for all PE images. e_lfanew at offset 0x3C points to the PE signature.

fields.name: e_lfanew
fields.note: File offset of the PE signature

code_example.source:
; === MZ Header (64 bytes at file offset 0x0000) ===
mz_header:
    dw 0x5A4D           ; e_magic = 'MZ'
    times 29 dw 0x0000  ; unused fields (58 bytes)
    dd 0x00000080       ; e_lfanew -> PE signature at 0x80

required_components.name: PE Signature
required_components.description: Four-byte magic at e_lfanew. Must be 'PE\0\0'.

fields.name: Signature
fields.note: ASCII 'PE' followed by two zero bytes

code_example.source:
; === PE Signature (4 bytes at 0x0080) ===
pe_signature:
    db 'P', 'E', 0, 0

required_components.name: COFF File Header
required_components.description: 20-byte COFF header. Machine = 0x8664 (AMD64). Characteristics = 0x2022 (EXECUTABLE_IMAGE | LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE | DLL). SizeOfOptionalHeader = 240 (PE32+).

code_example.source:
; === COFF File Header (20 bytes at 0x0084) ===
coff_header:
    dw 0x8664           ; Machine = AMD64
    dw NUM_SECTIONS     ; NumberOfSections
    dd 0                ; TimeDateStamp
    dd 0                ; PointerToSymbolTable
    dd 0                ; NumberOfSymbols
    dw 0x00F0           ; SizeOfOptionalHeader = 240 (PE32+)
    dw 0x2022           ; Characteristics: EXECUTABLE | LARGE_ADDR | DLL

required_components.name: Optional Header (PE32+, static DLL)
required_components.description: 240-byte PE32+ Optional Header. BaseOfData is absent. AddressOfEntryPoint is 0 (no DllMain) or a minimal DllMain RVA. ImageBase = 0x0000000180000000. DataDirectory[0] (Export) must be populated. Import and IAT directories are zeroed.

fields.name: AddressOfEntryPoint
fields.note: 0 = no DllMain; or RVA of minimal DllMain

fields.name: BaseOfData
fields.note: ABSENT — does not exist in PE32+

fields.name: DataDirectory[0] (Export)
fields.note: RVA and size of the Export Directory Table

code_example.source:
; === Optional Header PE32+ — Static DLL (240 bytes at 0x0098) ===
opt_header:
    dw 0x020B               ; Magic = PE32+
    db 0, 0                 ; LinkerVersion
    dd CODE_SIZE            ; SizeOfCode
    dd DATA_SIZE            ; SizeOfInitializedData
    dd 0                    ; SizeOfUninitializedData
    dd 0                    ; AddressOfEntryPoint = 0 (no DllMain)
    dd 0x1000               ; BaseOfCode
    ; Note: no BaseOfData field in PE32+
    dq 0x0000000180000000   ; ImageBase (64-bit DLL default)
    dd 0x1000               ; SectionAlignment
    dd 0x0200               ; FileAlignment
    dw 6, 0                 ; OS version 6.0
    dw 0, 0                 ; Image version
    dw 6, 0                 ; Subsystem version
    dd 0                    ; Win32VersionValue
    dd IMAGE_SIZE           ; SizeOfImage
    dd HDR_SIZE             ; SizeOfHeaders
    dd 0                    ; CheckSum
    dw 3                    ; Subsystem = WINDOWS_CUI
    dw 0x0160               ; DllCharacteristics: HIGH_ENTROPY_VA | DYNAMIC_BASE | NX_COMPAT
    dq 0x100000             ; SizeOfStackReserve (8 bytes)
    dq 0x1000               ; SizeOfStackCommit
    dq 0x100000             ; SizeOfHeapReserve
    dq 0x1000               ; SizeOfHeapCommit
    dd 0                    ; LoaderFlags
    dd 16                   ; NumberOfRvaAndSizes
    ; DataDirectory[0] — Export Table
    dd EXPORT_DIR_RVA, EXPORT_DIR_SIZE
    ; DataDirectory[1] — Import Table (none)
    dq 0
    times 3 dq 0            ; [2..4]
    dq 0                    ; [5] Base Reloc (optional)
    times 6 dq 0            ; [6..11]
    dq 0                    ; [12] IAT (none)
    times 3 dq 0            ; [13..15]

required_components.name: Export Directory Table
required_components.description: Single 40-byte structure. All RVAs are 32-bit even in PE32+. Lists exported functions by name for consumers using GetProcAddress or implicit linking.

code_example.source:
; === Export Directory + exported function (64-bit, static DLL) ===
section .edata
export_dir:
    dd 0                    ; Characteristics
    dd 0                    ; TimeDateStamp
    dw 0, 0                 ; Major/MinorVersion
    dd DLL_NAME_RVA         ; Name
    dd 1                    ; Base
    dd 1                    ; NumberOfFunctions
    dd 1                    ; NumberOfNames
    dd EAT_RVA              ; AddressOfFunctions
    dd NAME_PTR_RVA         ; AddressOfNames
    dd ORDINAL_TBL_RVA      ; AddressOfNameOrdinals

eat:        dd _Add_RVA
name_ptrs:  dd NAME_ADD_RVA
ordinals:   dw 0
dll_name:   db 'mylib.dll', 0
name_add:   db 'Add', 0

section .text
global Add
export Add

Add:
    ; x64: RCX = a, RDX = b
    lea   eax, [ecx + edx]
    ret
